title: Bothriochloa ewartiana

taxonomy: Bothriochloa ewartiana is classified within the family Poaceae. It belongs to the tribe Andropogoneae and the genus Bothriochloa. This species is further categorized as a type of grass. Bothriochloa ewartiana is native to Australia and is considered an invasive species in some regions. Its classification is based on its botanical characteristics and morphological features.
